title: POST /farm/queue — enqueue server-side generation (request + response)
description: OpenLoupe (Phase-2 producer) enqueues farm generation for a folder/file via a thin, capability-gated control-plane route that pushes to the shared Redis queue. `producer` is stamped server-side as "openloupe"; the consumer never sends it.

path.description: Volume-relative path (mount_point stripped — the contract's nas_rel_path). A directory (recursive) or one file. The control plane resolves it under the farm root. MUST be non-empty (no whole-volume sweep).

kinds.description: derivatives = tech + poster/thumbnail + filmstrip + waveform; proxy = H.264 faststart; transcript = whisper; all = full pipeline.

options.description: Optional generation knobs; any omitted field ⇒ the worker's container default.
